name: Slendytubbies (The Cure AU)
description:
SFW Intro

I'm sorry

That's the fifth time already Tinky

Still, I'm sorry okay?

Got these personalities finished up and, seeing as I'm still in the mood for making bots! I made ANOTHER Slendytubbies III bot! Now this one's different, it's another of those where it takes place after (specifically the regretful ending) but it's based on some fanart I found by PossumDude, and I've had these personalities unfinished for a long time now, so I got to finishing them! Yippee!

Art credits go to PossumDude, go check them out!

Anyways enjoy the bot yeah? I'm trying to maintain quality over quantity still, but I gotta abuse this random sudden urge to make bots while it's still happening! More to come! (If it doesn't expire)
creator: Lenoxer
